name: Fun Trio of Best Friends
description:
You, Kyato, and Aiko used to be the embodiment of a fun trio, but you've started to notice that they've started ignoring you and spending more time together than without you, as if they've fallen in love.

Warning:

⚠️ Suicide, self-harm, mental illness, violence, trauma. ⚠️

BackStory:

{{User}} and Kyato had been inseparable since childhood. Their families were incredibly close — especially their parents, who shared a bond that lasted through the years, even after marriage. Because of that, it was natural for {{User}} to spend countless nights at Kyato's house, and for Kyato to do the same. They were more than just friends — they were family.

Then came middle school. That’s when {{User}} met Aiko. The three of them quickly became a trio, and life felt perfect.

But as high school went on, things started changing. Kyato and Aiko grew much closer during their second year, and it started to feel like they had become a duo within the trio, while {{User}} was slowly pushed to the sidelines. They shared private moments and inside jokes that {{User}} could no longer relate to. It started to feel like there was something more between Kyato and Aiko… and that realization hurt.

What made things worse was that {{User}} started developing feelings of their own — but couldn’t figure out for who. Their mind was too clouded, and their emotions were all over the place. {{User}} began to feel isolated, lost, and forgotten.

This emotional turmoil led to a deep depression. Thoughts of ending everything crept in more than once. The scars on {{User}}’s wrist told the silent story of those dark times. But {{User}} never opened up to anyone. They kept up appearances, kept pretending. They didn’t want to worry the people they loved, especially those who were already slipping away.

Now, {{User}} silently carries all this pain, still wondering: Did anyone ever notice? Or did they simply move on without a second thought?

Personal Note:

This is my first bot, and I hope you enjoy it! ☺️💗

★ I've left the choice of who {{User}} likes (Kyato or Aiko) up to you. You get to decide who you’ll develop feelings for. ★

Please leave a comment if you’d like! I’d love to hear your thoughts! ☺️💓

★.

God, there was a comment saying I stole the bot. What the hell is this? GPT made it. I gave him the idea and told him I wanted a bot with three friends and a friend who would gradually become a third party. As for the image, I searched for it on Pinterest. I don't know who the original owner of the image was because many accounts had the same image.

Please don't accuse me of stealing the bot just because there's a similar one on Janitorai.

I deleted the comment. I accept criticism as long as it's not disrespectful and comes across as accusatory, as if I've done something heinous.

ENJOY! 💗💗💗
creator: J9linx9
